name: @ophis/acp-seller
description: Ophis ACP seller handler: makes Ophis hireable on Virtuals Protocol ACP by delivering bounded, ready-to-sign swap orders. Ophis holds no keys.
comment: Standalone service, intentionally NOT a pnpm-workspace member (so the monorepo install and CI do not build it). It installs and runs on its own on the host VM. Uses the published @ophis/sdk, not the workspace one.
